definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="String" id="loc_buf_t">loc_buf_t</variable><variable type="Number" id="X">X</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="-52" y="65"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops" inline="false"><field name="OP">OR</field><value name="A"><block type="entity_isonground"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="logic_negate"><value name="BOOL"><block type="entity_isonground"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">if (entity instanceof Player player) {&#10;            // Получаем блок, на который смотрит игрок (луч длиной 5 блоков)&#10;            BlockHitResult hitResult = (BlockHitResult) player.pick(5.0, 0.0F, false);&#10;            &#10;            if (hitResult != null && hitResult.getType() == HitResult.Type.BLOCK) {&#10;                BlockPos pos = hitResult.getBlockPos();&#10;                BlockState blockState = player.level().getBlockState(pos);&#10;                &#10;                // Вариант 1: Через ItemStack (рекомендуется)&#10;                ItemStack stack = new ItemStack(blockState.getBlock());&#10;                loc_buf_t = stack.getHoverName().getString();&#10;                &#10;                // Вариант 2: Через систему переводов (если нет блок-предмета)&#10;                // loc_buf_t = Component.translatable(blockState.getBlock().getDescriptionId()).getString();&#10;                &#10;                System.out.println("[LOOK] Block name: " + loc_buf_t);&#10;            } else {&#10;                // Нет блока под прицелом&#10;                loc_buf_t = "Nothing";&#10;                System.out.println("[LOOK] No block targeted");&#10;            }&#10;        }</field></block></statement><next><block type="return_string"><value name="return"><block type="text_join"><mutation items="1"></mutation><value name="ADD0"><block type="variables_get_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:loc_buf_t</field></block></value></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
